title: RFE: Provide a skopeo-login/skope-logout
body:
It would be good to provide a skopeo-login and a skopeo-logout command that works in the same manner as podman-login and podman-logout.  That way another package would not have to be installed in order for login to work.

Bonus points:  Have the guts of the login and logout code live in containers/common so that only minimal implementations would need to be made inside each of the three (Podman, Buildah, Skopeo) projects.

comments.body: Sharing everything in containers/common could be tough as Skopeo is not using cobra for the CLI.
You know what I call that @vrothberg ?  More opportunities!  ;^)
